word: G263 - ἀμάραντος - amárantos - am-ar'-an-tos - That fadeth not away

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: That fadeth not away
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G3133; unfading, that is, (by implication) perpetual: - that fadeth not away.
